name: testDeleteActiveFraudControlAddedToBusinessUnit
description: Delete Active Fraud Control added to Business Unit
descriptionHtml: Delete Active Fraud Control added to Business Unit

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0827.011129.25.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Delete Active Fraud Control added to Business Unit

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Select '0827.011129 company to bend Fraud Control' company using filter
Select 'Business unit 0827.011129' business unit using filter
Check if just deleted Fraud Control still presented in both tables
